Localization.Name: Nemec
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: Shubin Interstellar
Item Type: Fuel Pod
Hydrogen Flow Modifier: 2.15
Quantum Flow Modifier: 2.15
Max. Integrity: 23040
Capacity: 30 SCU

Shubin's fuel pods draw on a wealth and depth of experience and expertise built over centuries of development and innovation. The Nemec is an effective all-rounder, despite sacrificing some damage resistance in order to facilitate higher fuel transfer speeds.
